name: Kingdom Holdings Limited
summary: Kingdom Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells linen yarns in Mainland China, the European Union, and internationally. Its products include wet spun and organic linen yarns, linen yarn for knitting, and PEONY series products, as well as single dyeing function linen yarn. The company offers its linen yarns under the Ziwei Crape Myrtle and KINGDOM brands. In addition, it engages in trading activities; and processes agriculture products. The company exports its products to approximately 20 countries and regions. Kingdom Holdings Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Haiyan, China.
